title: Senior Full-stack Python Engineer (m/f/d) - Network Planning
tailored_summary: Senior Full-stack Python Engineer (m/f/d) - Network Planning-focused engineer. DevSecOps and Cloud Engineer with 2 years of production experience on Azure and AKS. Skilled in Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, Python, Shell Scripting, CI/CD. Built automation tools reducing manual ops work by 40-90% and MTTR by 40%. AZ-104 Certified.
